commit.message: Dude tried to use npm for me lol

Ensure .env exists before running cf-typegen

Add a pre-check to the cf-typegen script to copy .env.example to .env if .env doesn't exist. This prevents issues in CI/CD environments where the .env file may not be present.

Generate types in predeploy script

Fixes deploy script by generating Cloudflare types before running build.

Add account_id to wrangler.jsonc

Fixes authentication issues in CI by explicitly setting the account ID.

Generate Cloudflare types before typecheck in CI

Adds cf-typegen step before typecheck to generate worker-configuration.d.ts
which is needed for TypeScript to recognize Cloudflare Workers types.

Fix test formatting and add formatter rule to AGENTS.md

Style mismatches that were fixed:
- Single quotes → Double quotes
- Missing semicolons → Semicolons added

Added rule to AGENTS.md to always run formatter before committing.

Add mock test for CI

Adds a sanity check test so the CI test step passes.

Fix code formatting

Run prettier to fix formatting issues in CLI and web packages.

Add automatic Cloudflare deployment to CI

Deploys to Cloudflare Workers automatically after CI passes on main branch. Runs DB migrations before deployment using existing package.json scripts.
Fix flickering in web UI by using server functions to get auth state
Remove claude plugin – it's in a public repo now
Make the CLI support prod auth
Add public vars to wrangler config
Set up a proper d1 db
Add `claudecode hook` command to CLI to act as input for CC
Make `bun test` not run e2e tests from root
Start unified transcript for claude code
Add new sync command to upload multiple transcripts
Fix TypeScript errors in middleware logging
Add import-level debugging logs to start.ts
Use unified tanscript creation time as `created_at` candidate
Sentry maybe? Idk this is weird
Handle transcripts that are not in git repositories
Implement proper dark mode based on media query
